case_title: ROGER CARLOS MIS VS. BODHI RESTAURANT LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIS, ROGER CARLOS CAUICH AS TO DEFENDANT BODHI RESTAURANT LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA NAMU JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ROGER MIS'S MOTION TO VACATE THE ORDER REMOVING THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION OF DENNIS LEE AND REQUEST TO REINSTATE THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION OF DENNIS LEE PURSUANT TO CCP 473. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED IN PART. THE REQUEST TO RE-CALENDAR THE ORDER FOR EXAMINATION IS GRANTED, WHILE THE REQUEST TO REINSTATE THE PREVIOUS ORDER FOR EXAMINATION WITHOUT SERVICE ON MR. LEE IS DENIED. THE EXAMINATION WILL TAKE PLACE IN DEPARTMENT 514 ON JUNE 14 AT 2:00PM. THE MOVING PARTY MUST PREPARE AN APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR EXAMINATION ON THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM STATING THE EXAMINATION DATE AND BRING IT TO THE HEARING FOR SIGNATURE BY THE COURT. IN ORDER TO COMPORT WITH DUE PROCESS, THE ORDER MUST BE PERSONALLY SERVED ON MR. LEE IN ACCORDANCE WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 491.110, 708.110 AND 708.120 AT LEAST TEN DAYS BEFORE THE EXAMINATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR #5153

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Continued To Jul-24-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Order Of Examination
Off Calendar May-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ROGER MIS'S MOTION TO VACATE THE ORDER REMOVING THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION OF DENNIS LEE AND REQUEST TO REINSTATE THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION OF DENNIS LEE PURSUANT TO CCP 473.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted in part. The request to re-calendar the Order for Examination is granted, while the request to reinstate the previous Order for Examination without service on Mr. Lee is denied. The Examination will take place in Department 514 on June 14 at 2:00pm. The moving party must prepare an Application and Order for Examination on the Judicial Council Form stating the examination date and bring it to the hearing for signature by the court. In order to comport with due process, the Order must be personally served on Mr. Lee in accordance with Code of Civil Procedure sections 491.110, 708.110 and 708.120 at least ten days before the examination. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153

Mtn To Vacate The Order Removing Oex
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ROGER MIS' Motion To Vacate The Order Removing OEX. Off calendar for department 302. Plaintiff needs to contact Department 514 to determine whether he should re-file his motion to be heard in that Department or if the OEX can be re-calendared without the need for a noticed motion. Protem Judge: David Mcdonald, Not reported. =(302/HEK)

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Order Amending The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego Dennis Hansang
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ROGER MIS' MOTION TO VACATE THE ORDER AMENDING THE JUDGMENT TO ADD NON PARTY ALTER EGO DENNIS HANSANG LEE AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR PURSUANT TO CCP 473.
Appearances: Vijay K. Toke of Hiaring & Smith LLP (457.2040) for defendant and responding party; Elizabeth A. MacDonald (922.5939) for plaintiff and moving party.
Discussed and the court ruled as follows: Granted. No opposition was filed. On agreement of the parties, the court indicated this order will apply to both Dennis Hansang Lee and Chris J. Lee. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
